caseSnapshot.description: TreatmentAccessCase-shaped case snapshot from UiPath-owned state.

denialRescue.description: Output from Denial Rescue Agent with selected strategy and evidence refs.

evidenceMappings.description: EvidenceMapping array available for source-grounded drafting.

citations.description: Citation array to use in administrative appeal text.

clinicianReview.description: Current clinician signoff state. Drafting usually starts pending.

generatedAtIso.description: ISO timestamp supplied by the UiPath workflow.

appeal_strategy.description: Strategy copied or summarized from Denial Rescue Agent output.

draft_text.description: Administrative appeal draft labelled for clinician review.

draft_summary.description: Short summary for Action Center review.

evidence_used.description: Evidence mapping, artifact, attachment, and denial refs used in the draft.

citations.description: Citation objects or citation refs used in the draft.

unsupported_claim_warnings.description: Warnings for unsupported claims or assertions needing clinician signoff.

clinician_review_required.description: Always true unless clinicianReview already documents completed approval.

clinician_approved.description: True only if input clinicianReview explicitly indicates approval; otherwise false.

clinician_gate_status.description: One of requires_signoff, approved_with_edits, approved, blocked_rework.

action_center_task_key.description: Action Center contract key to create for review.

administrative_label.description: Required disclaimer label for the draft.

audit_summary.description: One-sentence event summary for the write-event API workflow.
